rulings.Case Title: BATES VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Dismissal Or Stay Due To Forum Non Conveniens Or In The Alternative For Change Of Venue; P&A; Decl Of Mark C Davis
rulings.Rulings: DENY BOTH MOTIONS. BOTH UNTIMELY GIVEN 4/22/02 TRIAL DATE. DEFENDANT ALSO FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE SUITABLE ALTERNATIVE FORUM. SEE AMERICAN CEMWOOD CORP. V. AMERICAN HOME ASSURANCE CO., (2001) 87 CAL.APP.4TH 431. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: LEWIS VS ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BHC)*
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: FOSTER VS SAN FRANCISCO HILTON
rulings.Rulings: DENY AS TO FAILURE TO ACCOMMODATE CAUSE OF ACTION. HILTON FAILS TO PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT DISABLED IN SEPARATE STATEMENT AND TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEFENDANT ACCOMMODATED PLAINTIFF. SEE JENSEN V. WELLS FARGO BANK, (2000) 85 CAL.APP.4TH 245, 263 AND PGS. 73-75 OF PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION. GRANT AS TO INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS UNDER RENO V. BAIRD, (1998) 18 CAL.4TH 640. DENY AS TO HARASSMENT CAUSE OF ACTION. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER ACTIONS WERE ISOLATED AND SPORADIC. DENY AS TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AND WORKPLACE DISCRIMINATION AND HARASSMENT IS OUTSIDE THE SCOPE OF THE EMPLOYMENT BARGAIN. SEE FRETLAND V. COUNTY OF HUMBOLDT, (1999) 69 CAL.APP.4TH 1478. GRANT HILTON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION PUNITIVE DAMAGES. GRANT AS TO ALL UNOPPOSED MATTERS. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: MACHUE VS A P GREEN INDUSTRIES INC*
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY DEFENDANT BORDEN INC. CAMP DECLARATION UNSIGNED AND UNDATED ACCORDINGLY NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE LIABILITY OF BORDEN AS PREMISES OWNER. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: RYDBERG VS RAYBESTOS-MANHATTAN, INC*
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: PHOENIX AMERICAN INC VS AMERICAN ARB
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE DECLARATORY RELIEF: GRANT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE PHOENIX BEING A SUCCESSOR TO RESOURCE, BEING A SIGNATORY TO EMPLOYEES RETENTION AGREEMENTS, OR FRAUD. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE FRAUDULENT TRANSFER: GRANT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE ALTER EGO OR FRAUD. MOTION TO CONTINUE 437C(H) DENIED FAILURE TO IDENTIFY SPECIFIC FACTS TO BE DISCOVERED. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: MARKETFIRST SOFTWARE VS WEB2WEB
rulings.Rulings: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED.

rulings.Case Title: SARRAN VS LEE
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY LEE DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS RE EXTENSION OF PAYMENT PERIOD ON NOTE. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE AUTHENTICITY OF NOTE. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE USURY NOTE ALLEGEDLY DRAFTED BY LEE SEE BUCK VS. DAHLGREN 23CALAPP3D 779. (LC(EX)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF CHINA VS. ZHEN-DONG YU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Dismiss Or Stay Based On Forum Non Conveniens; Appendix Of Non-California Authorities
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS DENIED. DEFENDANT IS A RESIDENT OF CALIFORNIA AND ALLEGED ASSETS ARE LOCATED HERE. PLAINTIFF BANK ALSO PRESENT IN CALIFORNIA. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: HANUS JELINEK VS. ROBERT BROWN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: To Quash; Declarations Of Roberta Brown, Robert Brown, Rowena Gargalicana
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO QUASH DENIED. PROCESS SERVER ROLAND DECLARATION ESTABLISHES PROPER POST AND MAIL SERVICE. FIVE DAYS TO RESPOND. ALLEGED DEFICIENCY IN SERVICE OF THREE DAY NOTICE NOT PROPERLY RAISED ON MOTION TO QUASH MAY BE ASSERTED AS GROUND ON MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. (PB)
